description: Ground-truth (gap -> RiskLevel) for risk scorer eval. 'acceptable' captures adjacent levels (used for weighted-accuracy partial credit).

items.obligation_text: All transaction records shall be maintained for 10 years from cessation under PMLA.
items.gap_description: No PMLA record retention policy exists.

items.scenario: Cyber incident reporting to RBI within 6 hours missing
items.obligation_text: Cyber security incidents shall be reported to RBI within 6 hours of detection.
items.gap_description: No 6-hour cyber incident reporting procedure exists.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall compensate customers for unauthorized electronic transactions within 10 working days.
items.gap_description: No compensation policy for unauthorized transactions.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall establish a Whistleblower / Vigil Mechanism.
Enhanced Due Diligence shall be performed for Politically Exposed Persons.
Banks shall monitor wire transfers for originator and beneficiary information.
items.gap_description: Existing AML policy does not cover wire transfer screening.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall maintain Leverage Ratio of at least 4%.
items.gap_description: No Leverage Ratio policy or monitoring exists.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall maintain NSFR of at least 100%.
items.gap_description: No NSFR policy or monitoring exists.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall conduct DR drills annually with documented results.
Banks shall conduct due diligence on third-party IT service providers.
items.gap_description: No vendor risk management framework exists.

items.obligation_text: Investment portfolios shall be valued at fair value at least quarterly.
items.gap_description: No fair value valuation policy exists.

items.obligation_text: Audit Committee shall comprise majority independent directors.
items.gap_description: No formal Audit Committee independence policy.

items.obligation_text: High-risk customer KYC shall be reviewed every 6 months.
items.gap_description: Existing policy covers annual review for medium-risk but not 6-monthly for high-risk.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall disclose MCLR/EBR rates to customers at loan sanction.
Banks shall submit Large Exposure Returns quarterly.
items.gap_description: No Large Exposure reporting framework exists.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall not extend credit to related parties beyond Connected Lending limits.
items.gap_description: No related party lending policy exists.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall maintain Customer Identification Programme.
Insurers shall maintain a solvency ratio of at least 150%.
